provider_source.source_of_truth_boundary: AOF runtime artifacts are the release session source of truth; raw provider streams are not included.

event_summaries.summary: Proceed from v8.8 reproduction and rollback proof to v8.9 external runtime outcome evidence and learning-loop update.
Runtime selected a bounded v8.9 implementation: outcome evidence plus learning-loop update, not production provider execution.
AOF runtime opened TASK-109 and generated provider outcome evidence and learning-loop audit artifacts.
Outcome evidence and learning-loop schemas, commands, parser support, tests, docs, and self-hosting proof artifacts were written.
Focused tests cover positive outcome/learning path and negative missing linked outcome failure.
No active blocker remains after parser support, outcome audit, and learning-loop audit pass; production execution remains explicitly out of scope.
Stop if outcome evidence or learning update is overclaimed as production provider execution, semantic truth, or market truth.

risk_candidates: Outcome evidence can be overclaimed as external provider truth unless not-proven boundaries are visible.
decision_candidates: v9.0 should require operator acceptance and safety drill before controlled provider execution.

redaction_boundary: No secrets, credentials, raw provider responses, or external payload bodies are included.
release_ready_boundary: Runtime-ready outcome and learning-loop evidence only; not production external execution authority.
not_proven: Session export proves traceable release evidence only, not semantic correctness or external execution value.
